evals.prompt: I need to add a new owner to the system. The owner is a company called Bergvliet Properties. I've dropped all their documents into /tmp/za-doc-test/pty_ltd_complete/ — can you classify them for me?
evals.expected_output: Agent asks entity type (or infers Company), classifies 7 documents into FICA/CIPC buckets, extracts fields from CoR14.3 and CoR39, validates completeness, outputs owner_classification.json with both directors in extracted_data, FICA and CIPC both complete, no red flags.

evals.prompt: Classify the owner documents at /tmp/za-doc-test/trust_owned_company/ — the company is a Pty Ltd that is owned by a trust called The Boland Property Trust.
evals.expected_output: Agent handles nested ownership, classifies 6 documents, separates trust docs (LoA + deed) into trust_entity block, flags old proof of address (Sept 2025 = >3 months old), flags missing: Sophie ID, Hendrik ID, bank confirmation letter, trust address proof. FICA incomplete, CIPC complete.

evals.prompt: We need to onboard Paarl Building Supplies CC as a landlord on the system. Their docs are in /tmp/za-doc-test/close_corporation/ — please process them.
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies entity type as Close Corporation, classifies CK1 as CIPC document, extracts 2 members from CK1 (60%/40%), finds both ID copies and proof of address for FICA, flags missing: SARS tax number, bank confirmation letter. CIPC complete (CK1 present), FICA incomplete.
